series_metadata.series_title: ADMINISTRATIVE FILES: Industries regulated by DFI-CF under applicable ORC/OAC laws.
series_metadata.series_description: These files relate to Consumer Finance licensees/registrants under the Check Cashing Act, Check Cashing Loan Act, Credit Services Organization Act, Insurance Premium Finance Act, Mortgage Broker Act, Pawnbroker Act, Precious Metals Dealers Act, Mortgage Loan Act, Short Term Loan Act, and Small Loan Act, and includes the original application with pertinent attachments, financial statements, renewal applications, general correspondence related to application and renewal (including annual reports), and a copy of the certificates of registration or licenses.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain original application (including pertinent attachments and work papers), renewal applications, and general correspondence including annual reports in operating area during company operation until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for five (5) years after the company is closed, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after the company ceases doing business as a registrant or licensee., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
